authorization: User explicitly requested the 1,000-example one-hour LoRA demo run on 2026-07-12.
review_method: Deterministic template review plus automated validation of every generated row.
limitations: Examples use fully synthetic mobile/web catalog identifiers and deterministic variations of ten reviewed policy templates, twenty scenarios, and five analysis windows. They contain no event tenant snapshot or source rows. Trace-level needs_review outcomes intentionally preserve production evidence gates. The 50% validation split measures template consistency and is not an independent generalization benchmark.
